tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Be Bank of India (Regional
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Be Bank of India (Regional'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Be the internal and external

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Be the internal and external
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Be the internal and external' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient.
